onboarding.title: Set up your school
onboarding.description: Fill in your preschool details to create your workspace.
onboarding.heroTitle: Start managing your preschool in one place
onboarding.heroSubtitle: Kinder CRM helps you handle enrollment, students, tuition, attendance, and parent communication from a single platform.
onboarding.footerHint: You can update school settings anytime after setup.
onboarding.schoolSlugHint: Used in URLs. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

steps.setupHint: Name, slug, and main campus for your organization.
steps.studentsHint: Import or add students and assign homeroom classes.
steps.operateHint: Attendance, daily reports, tuition, and parent portal.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.statsPlaceholder: CRM, student, and finance metrics will appear here in upcoming sprints.

platform.title: Platform Console
platform.description: Manage schools, subscriptions, and platform operations.

analytics.title: Subscription analytics
analytics.hint: Estimated MRR from active plans; SaaS invoice revenue; trial/churn from subscription history.

schools.title: Schools
schools.description: All tenants on the Kinder CRM platform.
schools.name: School

packages.title: Packages
packages.description: Edit quotas, pricing, and Stripe Price IDs for the fixed Free, Starter, and Pro catalog.
packages.priceMonthlyHint: Display price in VND — converted to USD on Stripe checkout
packages.priceYearlyHint: Yearly display price in VND — converted to USD on Stripe checkout

subscription.missingBadge: This school has no subscription — owners cannot access full features.
subscription.repairAlertDescription: Create a 14-day Free trial for this school. Use when production onboarding ran before packages were seeded.

enterpriseInquiries.title: Enterprise inquiries
enterpriseInquiries.description: Sales contact requests from school owners on the subscription page.

demoRequests.title: Demo requests
demoRequests.description: Demo requests submitted from the marketing website.

coupons.title: Discount codes
coupons.description: Create and manage promo codes for paid subscription checkout.
coupons.empty: Create percent-off or free-month codes for Stripe checkout.

suspended.title: School suspended
suspended.description: {{schoolName}} has been temporarily suspended. Please contact your administrator or Kinder CRM support.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.description: View your plan, limits, and change history.
subscription.workspaceHint: Manage your plan, monitor usage quotas, and review billing history.
subscription.trialFullAccess: Your trial includes full access to all modules until {{date}}.

trialBanner.title: Trial plan active
trialBanner.message: {{count}} days left with full feature access (until {{date}}).
trialBanner.messageOneDay: 1 day left on your trial — ends {{date}}.
trialBanner.messageToday: Your trial ends today. Upgrade to keep full access.
trialBanner.messageOpenEnded: You are on a trial with full access to all features.

billingBanner.pastDueMessage: Your plan is past due. You have {{count}} days to update payment before read-only mode.
billingBanner.pastDueMessageOneDay: 1 day left to update payment before read-only mode.
billingBanner.pastDueMessageToday: Today is the last day to update payment before read-only mode.
billingBanner.pastDueExpiredMessage: Payment is overdue. Features are limited to the Free plan until you pay again.
billingBanner.cancelledMessage: Your subscription was cancelled. Features and limits follow the Free plan.

subscription.pastDueGraceHint: {{count}} days left to update payment before read-only mode.
subscription.effectivePlanNote: Features and limits currently follow the {{plan}} plan.
subscription.readOnlyError: This account is read-only due to overdue payment or a cancelled subscription.

quotaLimit.studentsMessage: The {{plan}} plan allows up to {{max}} students (currently {{used}}).
quotaLimit.studentsSuggested: Upgrade to {{suggested}} to add more students.
quotaLimit.campusesMessage: The {{plan}} plan allows up to {{max}} campuses (currently {{used}}).
quotaLimit.campusesSuggested: Upgrade to {{suggested}} to add more campuses.

billingInterval.hint: Choose a billing cycle before upgrading.

enterpriseInquiry.title: Contact us for Enterprise
enterpriseInquiry.description: Our sales team will reach out within 1–2 business days with a plan tailored to your school.
enterpriseInquiry.submitted: Request sent — our sales team will contact you soon.

saasInvoices.title: Software invoices
saasInvoices.hint: VAT invoices for Kinder CRM subscription fees — separate from student tuition.
saasInvoices.emptyDescription: Invoices are created and emailed after each successful Stripe payment.

coupon.title: Discount code
coupon.hint: Enter a code before paying for a paid plan via Stripe.
coupon.summaryPercent: {{value}}% off on checkout for the selected plan
coupon.summaryFreeMonths: {{count}} free months on the selected plan

subscription.checkoutSuccess: Payment successful! Your plan has been updated.
subscription.checkoutCancelled: Checkout cancelled. You can try again anytime.
subscription.portalHint: Update your card, view invoices, or cancel via the Stripe Customer Portal.
subscription.portalPastDueHint: Payment failed — update your payment method to keep your current plan.
subscription.portalCheckoutFirst: Complete your first paid checkout to unlock the billing portal.
subscription.portalOwnerOnly: Only the school owner can manage billing.
subscription.portalNoCustomer: No Stripe customer yet — complete a paid checkout first.
subscription.portalNotConfigured: Stripe billing is not configured on this environment.
subscription.billingOwnerOnly: Only the school owner can manage billing and change plans.
subscription.storageLimitReached: Storage limit reached for your plan. Upgrade under Settings → Subscription.

comparison.title: Compare plans
comparison.hint: Limits and modules included in each subscription plan.

schoolSettings.title: School profile
schoolSettings.description: Update your school's information and branding.
schoolSettings.workspaceHint: Configure your school's public profile, contact details, and branding.
schoolSettings.basicInfoHint: School identity and contact information shown to staff and parents.
schoolSettings.brandingHint: Customize logo and primary color for a consistent school look.
schoolSettings.domainHint: Optional custom domain used for school portal access.
schoolSettings.name: School name
schoolSettings.logoHint: Supported formats: PNG, JPG, WEBP, GIF, SVG.
schoolSettings.themeColorHint: Choose a brand color used across cards and action buttons.

campuses.title: Campuses & branches
campuses.description: Manage campuses and branches for your school.
campuses.workspaceHint: Organize physical locations and branches across your school network.
campuses.name: Name
campuses.emptyDescription: Add your first campus or branch to organize classes and staff by location.

comingSoon.title: Coming soon
comingSoon.description: This feature is being built as part of Phase 1 in Plan.md.

errors.schoolSlugTaken: This slug is already taken. Please choose another.
errors.campusLimit: Campus limit reached for your current plan.
errors.studentLimit: Student limit reached for your current plan.

crm.title: Enrollment CRM
crm.description: Track interested parents and convert them into enrolled students with ease.
crm.workspaceHint: Drag leads between columns or use the stage menu to update the pipeline.
crm.emptyDescription: Get started by adding your first lead or importing from CSV.
crm.columnEmpty: No leads in this stage yet
crm.listDescription: Search and manage all leads in one place.
crm.detailHint: View lead information, notes, and pipeline activity.

students.title: Students
students.listDescription: View and manage all enrolled students.
students.workspaceHint: Filter by status, import/export, and open student profiles.
students.photoUploadHint: JPEG, PNG or WebP. Large images are compressed automatically (max 5 MB).
students.unsupportedPhoto: Unsupported image type. Use JPEG, PNG or WebP.
students.photoTooLarge: Image is too large. Maximum size is 5 MB.
students.photoProcessFailed: Could not process the image. Try another file.
students.photoUploadFailed: Could not upload the photo. Please try again.
students.detailHint: View profile, contacts, parent access, and activity history.

studentContracts.title: Student contracts
studentContracts.description: Manage enrollment, re-enrollment, service, and tuition agreements.
studentContracts.studentHint: Contracts linked to this student, including tuition and service agreements.
studentContracts.listDescription: Filter by type, status, or student. Export for reporting.
studentContracts.emptyDescription: Create the first contract or adjust your filters.
studentContracts.studentEmpty: No contracts for this student yet.
studentContracts.exportPdfError: Could not generate PDF. Please try again.
studentContracts.createInvoiceHint: Issue an invoice in Finance and link it to this contract.
studentContracts.searchPlaceholder: Search by contract, student, or code…

classes.title: Classes
classes.description: Manage school years, rooms, and class assignments.
classes.createDescription: Create a new class with school year, capacity, and homeroom teacher.
classes.listDescription: All active classes with enrollment and homeroom assignments.

classes.detailHint: Manage class settings, student roster, and weekly timetable.
classes.editClassDescription: Update class name, code, capacity, and homeroom teacher.
classes.confirmArchiveDescription: The class will be archived and hidden from active lists. Enrollments are preserved.
classes.rosterHint: Students currently enrolled in this class.
classes.timetableHint: Weekly activity schedule for this class.
classes.setupHint: Configure school years and classrooms before creating classes.
classes.schoolYearsHint: Academic periods used when creating and organizing classes.
classes.classroomsHint: Physical rooms available for class assignments.
classes.schoolYearsEmpty: No school years yet. Add one to get started.
classes.classroomsEmpty: No classrooms yet. Add one to get started.
classes.setAsCurrentYearHint: New classes default to the current school year.

finance.title: Finance
finance.description: Manage tuition, invoices, payments, and outstanding debt.
finance.workspaceHint: Track revenue, invoices, fee items, and outstanding balances.

invoices.listDescription: Track billing status and open invoice details.
invoices.title: Title
invoices.detailHint: Review line items, record payments, and generate QR codes.

debts.title: Outstanding debts
debts.listDescription: Students with unpaid or partially paid invoices.

paymentSettings.title: Payment settings
paymentSettings.description: Configure payment methods, bank accounts, and parent payment instructions.
paymentSettings.workspaceHint: Manage how parents pay tuition and how invoices display bank details.
paymentSettings.methodsHint: Enable at least one payment method. Bank transfer or QR is recommended for online payments.

importExport.studentsHint: Columns: full name, student code, date of birth, gender, class, parent name, parent phone, parent email, notes.
importExport.leadsHint: Columns: parent name, phone, email, child name, child DOB, notes, stage.

communication.title: Messages
communication.parentDescription: Chat with your child's homeroom teacher or the school office.
communication.staffDescription: Reply to parent messages from homeroom and school office channels.
communication.selectThread: Select a conversation from the list to start chatting.
communication.sendHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line.
communication.imageOptimized: Image was compressed to fit the size limit.
communication.unsupportedImage: Only JPEG, PNG, WebP, and GIF images are supported.
communication.imageTooLarge: Image is too large. Please choose a smaller file.
communication.imageProcessFailed: Could not process this image. Try another file.
communication.reactionFailed: Could not update reaction. Please try again.
communication.emptyThreads: No conversations yet. Messages will appear when you or the school start a chat.

communication.sendFailed: Could not send message. Please try again.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Manage school events, holidays, and important dates.
calendar.workspaceHint: View events by month and manage the school schedule.
calendar.emptyDescription: Create your first event to share the schedule with staff and parents.
calendar.notifyOnCreate: Notify staff and parents when published

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.description: Daily class attendance, leave requests, and reports.
attendance.workspaceHint: Take attendance by class, process leave requests, and monitor attendance rate in real time.
attendance.dailyHint: Update each student status, use quick check-in/check-out actions, then save in bulk.
attendance.noClasses: No active classes. Create a class and enroll students first.
attendance.noClassesDescription: You need at least one active class with enrolled students to start attendance.

leave.title: Leave requests
leave.description: Create and review student leave requests by date.
leave.empty: No leave requests for this filter.

calendar.title: Leave calendar
calendar.description: Review leave requests on a calendar and click a day to jump to daily attendance.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.pageDescription: Configure access for system roles (Admin, Manager, Staff) and custom roles.
permissions.description: Customize access per role. Owner always has full access.
permissions.ownerNote: Owner role always has all permissions and is not listed here.

roleDescriptions.owner: Full school ownership, including subscription and billing configuration.
roleDescriptions.admin: Full school management: system config, permissions, staff, students, and reports.
roleDescriptions.manager: Operations management: classes, teachers, admissions, and scoped reports.
roleDescriptions.staff: Business staff — granular access via the permission matrix or custom roles (HR, Accounting, etc.).
roleDescriptions.parent: Parent portal only — view child info, fees, attendance, and school communication.

customRoles.title: Custom roles
customRoles.description: Create school-specific roles (HR, Support, etc.) and configure their permissions in the matrix below.
customRoles.name: Role name
customRoles.deleteConfirm: Delete role "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

staff.title: Staff
staff.description: Manage employee profiles, departments, contracts, and class assignments.
staff.createDescription: Create a new employee profile and optionally grant system access.
staff.editDescription: Update employee information, role, and employment status.
staff.filterEmptyDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters to find employees.
staff.emptyDescription: Add your first employee or adjust filters to see more results.
staff.workspaceHint: Browse the directory, filter by department, and manage org setup.

staff.setupHint: Organize departments and positions before adding employees.
staff.listDescription: View and manage all employees in your school.
staff.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or employee ID…
staff.detailHint: View profile, contracts, and class assignments.

importExport.importHint: Upload a CSV with employee name, code, department, position, and contact details.
importExport.emptyFile: No valid rows found in the file.
importExport.failed: Import failed. Check the file format.

documents.title: HR documents
documents.hint: ID cards, degrees, certificates, and contracts.

staff.accessRoleHint: Login permissions (separate from the teacher flag).

staff.inviteFailedHint: System access is enabled but the invite email was not sent. Click Resend invite to send a password setup link.
staff.invitePendingHint: An invite was sent but the employee has not activated their account yet. If the link expired, click Resend invite for a new one.

calendar.eventsHint: School-wide and class events visible to your family.
calendar.upcomingHint: School events your family can see.
calendar.emptyDescription: When the school publishes events, they will appear here.

reports.timelineHint: Latest reports from teachers, newest first.

dailyReports.title: Daily reports
dailyReports.description: Record student activities, health, and daily routines.
dailyReports.workspaceHint: Log daily activities by class and track completion across the school.
dailyReports.classHint: Quick-edit mood and notes for each student. Open detail for meals, health, timeline, and media.
dailyReports.overviewHint: Completion status for all classes on the selected date.
dailyReports.emptyClass: No students enrolled in this class.
dailyReports.noClassesDescription: Create active classes before writing daily reports.
dailyReports.mediaUploadHint: Upload photos or videos for the report you are editing. Parents only see them after you send the report.
dailyReports.saveBeforeMedia: Save the report before uploading media
dailyReports.deleteReportConfirm: Delete this draft? This cannot be undone.
dailyReports.draftParentHint: Parents only see reports that have been sent. Use "Send to parents" to publish.
dailyReports.acknowledgedReadOnly: The parent has acknowledged this report — it can no longer be edited.
dailyReports.exportEmpty: No daily reports to export for this date.
dailyReports.remindStaffAllComplete: All classes have sent daily reports for this date.

mealMenu.title: Meal menu
mealMenu.description: Plan weekly menus, dishes, and ingredients.
mealMenu.workspaceHint: Manage weekly menus, dish library, ingredients, and reusable templates.
mealMenu.createMenuDescription: Create a new menu period for your school.
mealMenu.addDishDescription: Add a dish to the library for use in weekly menus.
mealMenu.addIngredientDescription: Track ingredients and optionally link them to inventory.
mealMenu.saveTemplateDescription: Save an existing menu as a reusable template.
mealMenu.menusListDescription: All menu periods with publish status and week planner access.
mealMenu.dishesListDescription: Dish library used when planning meals.
mealMenu.ingredientsListDescription: Ingredient catalog with optional inventory links.
mealMenu.templatesListDescription: Reusable menu templates to apply to draft menus.
mealMenu.emptyMenusDescription: Create your first weekly menu to start planning meals.
mealMenu.emptyDishesDescription: Add dishes to build your meal library.
mealMenu.emptyIngredientsDescription: Add ingredients to track allergens and inventory.
mealMenu.emptyTemplatesDescription: Save a menu as a template to reuse it later.
mealMenu.detailHint: Plan weekly meals and review nutrition summaries.
mealMenu.noIngredientRequirements: No ingredient data for dishes in this week.
mealMenu.editDishDescription: Update dish name, allergens, and portion notes.
mealMenu.editIngredientDescription: Update ingredient details and inventory link.
mealMenu.noInventoryLinkHint: Not linked to inventory — edit to connect a stock product.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.description: Track materials, stock movements, and low-stock alerts.
inventory.workspaceHint: Manage products, stock movements, suppliers, and purchase orders.
inventory.transferHint: Move stock between products when items are reclassified or consolidated.
inventory.addProductDescription: Add a product to track stock levels and low-stock alerts.
inventory.editProductDescription: Update product name, SKU, and minimum stock level.
inventory.productsListDescription: All inventory products with current stock levels.
inventory.emptyProductsDescription: Add your first product to start tracking inventory.
inventory.addSupplierDescription: Add a supplier for purchase orders and receipts.
inventory.emptySuppliersDescription: Add suppliers to create purchase orders.
inventory.recordTransactionDescription: Record a stock receipt, issue, or adjustment.
inventory.emptyTransactionsDescription: Record your first transaction to track stock changes.
inventory.emptyLowStockDescription: All products are above their minimum stock levels.
inventory.needTwoProducts: At least 2 products are required to transfer stock.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.description: Chat, forecasts, and internal knowledge for your school.
ai.workspaceHint: Chat with the assistant, review insights, and manage knowledge articles.
ai.descriptionFallback: Basic mode — add OPENAI_API_KEY for full AI.
ai.chatEmpty: Ask about attendance, daily reports, menu, inventory, or enrollment.
ai.providerFallback: OpenAI not configured — using basic suggestions
ai.emptyKnowledge: No knowledge articles yet — add policies and FAQs for better AI answers.
